evals.prompt: I need generate cert for dev.example.test with SANs dev.example.test and localhost.
evals.expected_output: Use the certificate-generator skill for this certificate generator request and produce the documented result for dev.example.test with SANs dev.example.test and localhost.
expectations: Selects certificate-generator for requests matching its trigger description.
Uses the documented tool surface: cert_generate.
Keeps the response focused on generating self-signed SSL/TLS certificates for testing and development.

evals.prompt: Generate a development certificate for dev.example.test with SANs dev.example.test and localhost.
evals.expected_output: Use the certificate-generator skill and avoid substituting adjacent skills when the user asks for this focused workflow.
expectations: Selects certificate-generator instead of a generic certificate or TLS skill.
Avoids unrelated scanning, generation, or remediation steps unless requested.
States any required inputs or limitations from the skill instructions.
